svg.title: Building a life in Canada, the whole service across government
svg.desc: Eleven steps in order, snaking left to right then back: get permission to come (IRCC, highlighted), labour market assessment (ESDC), enter Canada (CBSA), Social Insurance Number (Service Canada), bank account (private), health card (province), driver's licence (province), recognise credentials (regulator), enrol kids in school (province), taxes and child benefit (CRA), PR renewal and citizenship (IRCC). Boxes are coloured by level of government, showing the journey is owned by many offices.
svg.text: GOAL: BUILD A LIFE IN CANADA
The highlighted box is the part most people call "the service". It is one step of many.
